title: TweetFeed
description: TweetFeed is a community-driven IOC project collecting threat indicators shared by security researchers on social media. This connector ingests TweetFeed IOCs and imports them into OpenCTI as Observables and Indicators, enabling correlation with other threat intelligence entities in the platform.
short_description: Imports community-sourced threat IOCs from TweetFeed (tweetfeed.live) into OpenCTI as Observables and Indicators.
